name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Network Connection
notes: This Building Block triggers when a network connection has been detected.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Network Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001840) Network connection detected
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Network Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001840) Network connection detected
